infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Stride needs camera access to analyze your feet and provide personalized shoe recommendations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stride needs photo library access to save foot scan images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Stride uses your location to map live runs and save route history.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Stride uses your location to keep tracking a live run when the screen locks.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Stride reads your workouts from Apple Health to automatically log runs and track mileage on your shoes.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Stride writes workout summaries to Apple Health to keep your fitness data in sync.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Stride to access your camera to scan your feet for personalized recommendations.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Stride uses your location to map your runs, track territory in DRIFT, and detect your city automatically.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Stride uses your location while you run to map your route.
